title: フェブラリーSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're finally here, ready to take on the February
Stakes! Most Umamusume would be shaking in
their boots right now, but...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow, did you see the size of the crowd?! There's like twice as many as before!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Do you think there's some kind of special event
today?
choice_data_list: They're probably here for the G1.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: "Gee one"? That sounds kind of familiar!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What a cool name. I wanna check it out, too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: After I'm done today, let's go watch it together!
choice_data_list: Focus on winning this race first!
Focus on winning this race first!
